title: The Names of His Judges, Secretaries, and Tax Officials
description: Muhammad b. CAbdallah al-Mukharrimi770 - Abu al-Fath Na$r b. al-Mughirah77t - Sufyan - Mis`ar:772 When Abu Bakr took power, Abu `Ubaydah said to him, "I will take care of finance - meaning taxes (jiza-')-for you." `Umar said, "I will take care of judicial matters for you." Though `Umar stayed [in office] for a year, not even two men came to him. `Ali b. Muhammad - those whom I have named - certain authorities: Abu Bakr made `Umar his judge during his caliphate. He stayed in office for a year, but no one brought any dispute to him.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 11
